title: Applicants Search
description: The Applicants module now includes a search feature that allows Administrators and Regional Contacts to search for applicants by name, congregation, or status. The search is accessible from the Applicants landing page via a new Search Criteria card. Users can enter partial names, select a congregation from a dropdown, or filter by applicant status (Pending, Approved, Denied, Withdrawn). Results display in a sortable table with columns for Name, Congregation, Status, and Date Submitted. Clicking a result opens the applicant's profile. The search supports pagination with 25 results per page.

userStories.title: Administrator searches by name
userStories.description: As an Administrator, I want to search for applicants by entering a partial name so that I can quickly find a specific applicant without scrolling through the full list.

userStories.title: Regional Contact filters by status
userStories.description: As a Regional Contact, I want to filter applicants by status (Pending, Approved, Denied, Withdrawn) so that I can review all applicants at a specific stage of the process.

userStories.title: Search results pagination
userStories.description: As a user, I want search results to be paginated at 25 per page so that the page loads quickly even with hundreds of applicants.
